title: Better Hammers
description: 🔨 Mine multiple blocks at once with hammers !
body:
# Better Hammers ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae1130da7e0028870c1179b383da30ec72c28090_0.webp) A vanilla-plus mod that adds multi-block mining hammers to Minecraft. ## Features: > **Excavation**: Swing your hammer to break multiple connected blocks in a single hit! Perfect for clearing out large areas or finding ores quickly. Be warned: this powerful action consumes extra durability and hunger.

> **Supercharge with New Enchantments!**: Take the destruction to the next level with two brand-new enchantments! Make your mining area wider or deeper than ever before. > > They’re fully compatible with all vanilla enchantments, so you can make your ultimate, unbreaking, fortune-bearing super-hammer! > > _For detailed info on the new enchantments, pair it with the [Enchantment description](https://modrinth.com/project/UVtY3ZAC) mod_.

> **Vanilla integration**: Better Hammers is perfectly woven into the vanilla experience. Hunt for hammers in ancient loot chests or wrestle them from the cold, dead hands of zombies!
